creator: freebsd@justmail.de
text:
Created attachment 209700
Screenshot after killed lazygit

After starting lazygit, it shows the UI, but after that, no further input is recognized at all. Even ctrl-c is not showing effect. The process is killable, but after killing, the terminal in which lazygit was started does not recognize to any ctrl-c any more. After i've killed the process, all characters i've typed in are printed on the console [see bottom of attached screenshot]. It makes no difference if i start lazygit inside a xterm or on the console.
